title: f-strings: building text
body: An *f-string* builds text with values dropped straight in. Put `f` before the quote and wrap any value in `{}`: `f"Hello {name}, you scored {score}"`. It's cleaner than gluing strings with `+`, and you can format too — `f"{ratio:.2f}"` shows two decimals. You'll use these anywhere you build a message or a report line.
